function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), then followed nested AGENTS in 99_system, 10_entities, 10_entities/cast, and 40_projects. Resolved informal reference via canonical cast record and searched projects by structured alias identifier.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/oskar.md` identifies the school-age child as alias `oskar`. Searching `40_projects` for this structured identifier returned five canonical project README matches containing `entity.oskar`, and each README title provides the exact project name.
